title: Event Frame
description: An activity-feed event pushed live to the SPA: a fault, safety-interlock activation, profile application, setpoint edit, or drift detection. The SPA prepends it to the activity feed cache and raises a toast when severity is critical (frontend data model §5). This is the frontend-rest EventEntry shape with its greenhouse_id and ts carried by the frame envelope rather than inline (REST bodies have no envelope, so EventEntry embeds them; here they live in the envelope). Greenhouse-scoped — the envelope zone_id is null.

source.description: Who or what produced the event (audit attribution, platform §6) — e.g. operator, crop_profile, optimizer.

zone_id.description: Always null: events surface at greenhouse scope on the dashboard, matching the frontend-rest EventEntry.
